name: Nerissa Ravencroft & Ouro Kronii | The Charm of Time and Sound
description:
They need some attention from you~

I love blue sexy girls🕕🎶

Well, this is my third bot, and also featuring two of my favorite girls from Hololive. I really love these two, and I thought it was about time someone made a bot with these two lovely ladies.

Like the other two bots I created, this one is also a multi-character bot. I don’t know, I just enjoy having more than one girl to interact with, especially since there are so many single-character bots already.

Also, technically, nothing says you’re a man, so you can try being whatever you want. I’m just not sure how well that’s going to work for the girls, though.

I wonder if anyone even reads this thing...
creator: Ia F
